problem id: d3d630b9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01011100 -> 00101000
  00000111 -> 00000010
  00111110 -> 00011100
  00010101 -> 00001010
  00000101 -> 00000010
  10111001 -> 01010000
  01110111 -> 10101010
  01110010 -> 00100000
  10110011 -> 01000001
  01000111 -> 10000010

query: 01000100
predicted answer: 00000000
